transcript: Speaker A: So mere paas bahut saare messages aate hain ki ma'am humein koi aisa app bataiye jisse hum apni English improve kar sakein. Humare paas time nahi hai sessions lene ka, routine bahut hectic hai, toh koi application jo humein humare confidence aur fluency ko badhane mein madad kare. So, I've got my hands on this app and literally yeh aapke liye game changer ho sakta hai. So, is app ka naam hai SpeakX. Maine link bhi yahan pe de diya hai, aap check kar sakte ho. You get your personal AI teacher Sia. Short-short 15 minutes ke lessons hote hain jo aap regularly kar sakte ho, time nikal ke. Aur best part jo mujhe laga is app ka, because I have personally used it also, toh iska instant feedback dena. There are a lot of conversations: work, interview, real-life scenarios. It is trusted by 1 Cr+ learners, 10M+ downloads hain, 4.6+ rating hai. To be honest, mujhe kaafi affordable app laga hai as compared to other apps. Aur yahan par aapko bilingual support bhi mil jata hai. If you want to give it a try, you can install this app from Play Store or App Store. Maine yahan pe link bhi de diya hai toh aap directly jaake access kar sakte ho. [So I get a lot of messages asking for an app to improve English because of busy schedules. I found this app which can be a game changer. The app is called SpeakX. You get a personal AI teacher, Sia, with short 15-minute lessons. The best part is the instant feedback. It covers various conversation topics like work and interviews. It is trusted by over 1 crore learners, has 10M+ downloads, and a 4.6+ rating. It is very affordable and offers bilingual support. You can download it from the Play Store or App Store via the link provided.]
on_screen_text: SpeakX; Talk about anything, Available 24x7, Anytime Anywhere, Talk Now; 1Cr+ Learners, 10M+ Downloads, 4.6+ Rating
summary: The presenter recommends the SpeakX app for busy individuals looking to improve their English fluency and confidence. She highlights features like the AI teacher Sia, 15-minute daily lessons, instant feedback, and diverse conversation topics. The ad concludes with strong social proof metrics and a call to download the app.
